endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Capacity/reservationorders/{reservationOrderId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/reservationDetails
endpoints.description: Lists the reservations details for provided date range.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESERVATIONORDERID}} with a real reservationorderid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Capacity/reservationorders/{reservationOrderId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/reservationSummaries
endpoints.description: Lists the reservations summaries for daily or monthly grain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESERVATIONORDERID}} with a real reservationorderid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Capacity/reservationorders/{reservationOrderId}/reservations/{reservationId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/reservationDetails
endpoints.description: Lists the reservations details for provided date range.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid. Replace {{RESERVATIONORDERID}} with a real reservationorderid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Capacity/reservationorders/{reservationOrderId}/reservations/{reservationId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/reservationSummaries
endpoints.description: Lists the reservations summaries for daily or monthly grain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid. Replace {{RESERVATIONORDERID}} with a real reservationorderid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Consumption/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available consumption REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingPeriods/{billingPeriodName}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/marketplaces
endpoints.description: Lists the marketplaces for a scope by billing period and subscriptionId. Marketplaces are available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BILLINGPERIODNAME}} with a real billingperiodname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingPeriods/{billingPeriodName}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/pricesheets/default
endpoints.description: Get the price sheet for a scope by subscriptionId and billing period. Price sheet is available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BILLINGPERIODNAME}} with a real billingperiodname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingPeriods/{billingPeriodName}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/usageDetails
endpoints.description: Lists the usage details for a scope by billing period. Usage details are available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BILLINGPERIODNAME}} with a real billingperiodname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets
endpoints.description: Lists all budgets for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{budgetName}
endpoints.description: Gets the budget for a subscription by budget name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BUDGETNAME}} with a real budgetname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{budgetName}
endpoints.description: The operation to create or update a budget. Update operation requires latest eTag to be set in the request mandatorily. You may obtain the latest eTag by performing a get operation. Create operation does not require eTag.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BUDGETNAME}} with a real budgetname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{budgetName}
endpoints.description: The operation to delete a budget.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BUDGETNAME}} with a real budgetname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/marketplaces
endpoints.description: Lists the marketplaces for a scope by subscriptionId. Marketplaces are available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/pricesheets/default
endpoints.description: Gets the price sheet for a scope by subscriptionId. Price sheet is available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/usageDetails
endpoints.description: Lists the usage details for a scope by billing period. Usage details are available via this API only for May 1, 2014 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{budgetName}

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BUDGETNAME}} with a real budgetname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
